ast.name: error

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Process active page if external link was pasted.
ast.target: 如果粘贴了外部链接，则处理活动页面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Interval in milliseconds for processing update.
ast.target: 处理更新的时间间隔（毫秒）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of attempts to process content on paste. For me 3 attempts is enouth with 1 second update interval.
ast.target: 粘贴时处理内容的尝试次数。对我来说，使用1秒更新间隔，3次尝试就足够了。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Clean malformed image tags before processing.
ast.target: 处理前清理格式错误的图像标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show notifications when pages were processed.
ast.target: 页面处理完成时显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include only files matching this regex pattern when running on all notes.
ast.target: 在所有笔记上运行时，仅包含匹配此正则表达式模式的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder to keep all downloaded media files.
ast.target: 用于保存所有下载的媒体文件的文件夹。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: I could not process content on the fly when it is pasted. So real processing implements periodically with the given here timeout.
ast.target: 我无法在粘贴时实时处理内容。因此，实际处理会定期使用此处指定的超时时间进行。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: I could not find the way to access newly pasted content immediatily, after pasting, Plugin's API returns old text for a while. The workaround is to process page several times until content is changed.
ast.target: 我找不到在粘贴后立即访问新粘贴内容的方法，插件的API会在一段时间内返回旧文本。解决方法是多次处理页面，直到内容发生变化。
